name: tvt-sales-skills
description: Tavant fintech sales team marketplace — one plugin: 38 tvt-* skills, including the tvt-sales-engine sales router, intel research, sales point-tools, presentations, product/AI-opportunity scoring, general reasoning, and governance. One install action covers everything.

plugins.name: tvt-sales-skills
plugins.description: Full sales-team toolkit — who to call this week, account research with fact-checking, POV/deck/proposal drafting, honest deal scorecards. AI drafts, you send. Bundles the Tavant playbooks and branded template it references.
